lines.english: The sublime essence of the Beloved Naam is utterly sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak kau jug jug har jas deejai har japeeai ant na paaeaa |5|
lines.english: O Lord, please bless Nanak with Your Praise in each and every age; meditating on the Lord, I cannot find His limits. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਘਟ ਘਟ ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਜਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: dughatt ghatt bhau bhanjan paaeeai baahurr janam na jaaeaa |6|
lines.english: On that most difficult path, the Destroyer of fear is found, and one does not have to enter the womb of reincarnation again. ||6||
With the Naam deep within the nucleus of the self, the jewel is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਧੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har japate man man te dheeraa |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, the mind is comforted and consoled by the mind itself.
I beg for the treasure of the Naam, and the Lord's Praise.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, inspiration for loving devotional worship wells up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਿਓ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਤਿ ਵਾ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: jin jap japio satigur mat vaa ke |
lines.english: One who chants the Lord's Chant, attains the Wisdom of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਗੁਰ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਤਾਰੇ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har bhaavai gur mel milaae har taare jagat sabaaeaa |7|
lines.english: When it pleases the Lord, He unites me in Union with the Guru; the Lord saves the whole world. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਤਮ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਜਗੁ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aootam sangat gat mit aootam jag bhaujal paar taraaeaa |8|
lines.english: In the noble congregation of the Sangat, one's state and way of life become noble as well, and one crosses over the terrifying world-ocean. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕੰਕਰ ਕਾਲੁ ਸੇਵਕ ਪਗ ਤਾ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: jamakankar kaal sevak pag taa ke |
lines.english: The tyrant, the Messenger of Death, becomes a servant at his feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਬਾਣ ਲੇ ਜਮ ਕਉ ਮਾਰੈ ਗਗਨੰਤਰਿ ਧਣਖੁ ਚੜਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: panch baan le jam kau maarai gaganantar dhanakh charraaeaa |9|
lines.english: Taking up the five arrows of virtue, Death is killed, drawing the Bow of the Tenth Gate in the Mind's Sky. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰ ਤਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: eihu bhavajal jagat sabad gur tareeai |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, one crosses over this terrifying world-ocean.
The duality within is burnt away from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਨਰਿ ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: saakat nar sabad surat kiau paaeeai |
lines.english: How can the faithless cynics attain enlightened awareness of the Shabad?
Without awareness of the Shabad, they come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਰਾਇਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh mukat paraaein har poorai bhaag milaaeaa |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh obtains the support of liberation; by perfect destiny, he meets the Lord. ||10||
The Fearless True Guru is our Savior and Protector.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਨਿ ਅਨੰਦ ਅਨਾਹਦੁ ਵਾਜੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: dhun anand anaahad vaajai gur sabad niranjan paaeaa |11|
lines.english: The blissful music of the unstruck sound current vibrates and resounds; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Immaculate Lord is obtained. ||11||
Devotional worship is obtained through the Guru, the Lord of the world.
God Himself is unseen; He reveals Himself through His wondrous creative power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਅਤੀਤੁ ਅਜੋਨੀ ਸੰਭਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: aap ateet ajonee sanbhau naanak guramat so paaeaa |12|
lines.english: He Himself is unattached, unborn and self-existent. O Nanak, through the Guru's Teachings, He is found. ||12||
He alone is fearless, who has no destiny written on His head.
He alone is fearless, who realizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
The True Guru knows the state of one's inner being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਅਨਤ ਨ ਮਨੁ ਡੋਲਾਇਆ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: antar dekh nirantar boojhai anat na man ddolaaeaa |13|
lines.english: He looks within his own inner being, and realizes the Lord within all; his mind does not waver at all. ||13||
He alone is fearless, within whose being the Lord abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak har jas sangat paaeeai har sahaje sehaj milaaeaa |14|
lines.english: O Nanak, in the Sangat, the Holy Congregation, the Lord's Praise is obtained, and one easily, intuitively meets the Lord. ||14||
Day and night, he is delighted with the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord.
One who knows God, within the self and beyond,

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਪਰਿ ਆਦਿ ਸਰਬ ਤਿਹੁ ਲੋਈ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੫॥੪॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: aoopar aad sarab tihu loee sach naanak amrit ras paaeaa |15|4|21|
lines.english: The True Primal Lord is over all the three worlds; O Nanak, His Ambrosial Nectar is obtained. ||15||4||21||
remains detached, and brings his wandering mind back to its home.
Maaroo, First Mehl:
The Creator Lord is infinite; His creative power is wondrous.
The all-pervading Lord orchestrates all through His Hukam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਉਪਾਇ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਦੇ ਆਪੇ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਚਲਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeea upaae rijak de aape sir sir hukam chalaaeaa |1|
lines.english: He formed the living beings, and He Himself sustains them; the Hukam of His Command controls each and every one. ||1||
Created beings have no power over Him.
Who is near, and who is far away?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਹਰਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਤਾਕੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gupat pragatt har ghatt ghatt dekhahu varatai taak sabaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Behold the Lord, both hidden and manifest, in each and every heart; the unique Lord is permeating all. ||2||
One whom the Lord unites with Himself, merges in conscious awareness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨਦ ਰੂਪ ਅਨੂਪ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਭਰਮੁ ਜਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aanad roop anoop agochar gur miliai bharam jaaeaa |3|
lines.english: God is the embodiment of bliss, incomparably beautiful and unfathomable; meeting with the Guru, doubt is dispelled. ||3||
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, meditate on the Lord's Name.
In the end, when I must depart, it shall be my only help and support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਧਨ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan dhan te naam piaaraa |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is more dear to me than my mind, body and wealth.
